headline: Why Tyson Foods' Prepared Foods Business Is Driving Long-Term Growth
summary: TSN's Prepared Foods unit is gaining share, growing sales and offsetting higher costs as innovation and brand strength support long-term plans.

raw.headline: Why Tyson Foods' Prepared Foods Business Is Driving Long-Term Growth
raw.summary: TSN's Prepared Foods unit is gaining share, growing sales and offsetting higher costs as innovation and brand strength support long-term plans.

headline: Trump Touts Walmart Price Cuts on White House Request to Mark America 250, Pushes Other Retailers to Follow 'Absolute Patriots'
summary: Trump says Walmart will cut prices, including on ground beef, to mark America's 250th anniversary, urging other retailers to follow.

raw.headline: Trump Touts Walmart Price Cuts on White House Request to Mark America 250, Pushes Other Retailers to Follow 'Absolute Patriots'
raw.summary: Trump says Walmart will cut prices, including on ground beef, to mark America's 250th anniversary, urging other retailers to follow.
